title: CloudSpend v1
description: Hand-authored ledger of REAL cloud dollar observations. Companion to the token-based HEARTH ledger and the est_usd_saved projection: this file records what a billing surface actually showed, never a figure derived from unverified per-token prices (the gemini_pricing.py honest-null convention). Append-only in spirit — corrections add a new entry that supersedes, they do not rewrite history. Every entry names its evidence and its author.

date.description: Date the amount was observed (not necessarily incurred).

provider.description: Cloud provider, e.g. gcp, azure, aws.

project.description: Provider-side project/subscription id. Null if account-level.

amount_usd.description: Dollar amount as observed. Positive = spend/drawdown.

amount_kind.description: observed = read off a billing surface; estimated = reconstructed from rates or deltas. Estimates must say so.

period_start.description: Start of the period the amount covers, if known. Null = point observation.

period_end.description: End of the period the amount covers, if known.

attribution.description: What the money bought — service/category, best current understanding.

evidence.description: Where the number was seen (console page, banner, API query) — enough for someone else to re-check.

supersedes.description: entry_id this entry corrects/refines. Null for originals.

notes.description: Free-form context: reconciliation math, open questions.

authored_by.description: Person or process that recorded this entry.
